author: zlipeng
abstract: End-to-end workflow skill for multi-phase plans: generate a plan, persist under plans/NNN-<title>.md, branch off the main development branch, then execute Phase-by-Phase with two hard gates — a pre-Phase re-planning gate that re-validates remaining steps against what earlier Phases actually produced, and a post-Phase review gate that runs the bundled reviewer prompt in an isolated context (sub-agent or fresh session) so the reviewer cannot inherit the implementer's reasoning. Each Phase ends in a single dedicated commit; once all Phases pass review, a Test Cases section is appended that maps every Acceptance Criterion to a runnable case. Includes runtime adapters for Claude Code (/code-review skill or Agent sub-agent), Codex CLI (/review or subprocess session), and a generic inline fallback. Plan documents follow a language-priority rule: explicit user request > conversation language > English fallback.
